summary: Completed S7 PR-09 podcast chapter support cutover: added chapter persistence/migration, RSS chapter extraction + idempotent sync persistence, chapter API hydration, and chapter-aware player/transcript UI with focused green tests.
how_to_test: make migrate-test && cd python && DATABASE_URL=postgresql+psycopg://postgres:postgres@localhost:54322/nexus_test uv run pytest -q tests/test_podcasts.py::TestPodcastApiSurface::test_sync_extracts_podcasting20_chapters_and_exposes_episode_and_media_contract tests/test_podcasts.py::TestPodcastApiSurface::test_sync_extracts_podlove_chapters_when_podcasting20_is_absent tests/test_migrations.py::TestPodcastEpisodeChapterMigration::test_head_contains_podcast_episode_chapters_table_contract && cd ../apps/web && npm run test -- "src/app/(authenticated)/media/[id]/TranscriptMediaPane.test.tsx" "src/__tests__/components/GlobalPlayerFooter.test.tsx"
risks: Podcasting 2.0 chapter manifest fetching is synchronous and can add subscription sync latency for feeds with many chapter manifests.
External chapter image/link data is normalized but still untrusted feed content; presentation surfaces should remain defensive.
